title: CatalogItem
description: A single deduplicated entry in the SaferSkills catalog (a skill, MCP server, hook, or plugin). W1 placeholder shape — replaced by the real model from Initiative I-02 / Track A in W2.

kind.description: Artifact taxonomy. Extended via the W2 schema rewrite.

displayName.description: Human-facing name as resolved from the source artifact.

githubUrl.description: Canonical GitHub URL when the artifact lives in a public Git repo. Null for npm-only or curl-installed artifacts.

metadata.description: Extensible bag for per-kind fields surfaced by W2 ingestion adapters. Treat as opaque at the API boundary.
